title: lilium bakerianum var. delavayi
intro: Lilium bakerianum var. delavayi, also known as the Baker's lily or Delavay's lily, is a variety of the Baker's lily plant, native to the Sichuan and Yunnan provinces in China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Lilium bakerianum var. delavayi include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antiseptic. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also dried and used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments.
